title: Search | Depop
memory: The previous attempt to document the search results page confirmed that the query "iphone 15 pro 256gb" returned 0 results, showing a "Browse Depop" section instead. I have identified the grid structure, price locations, available filters, and the "Boosted Listings" popup.

extract.query: Document the Depop search results page: 1. Confirm listing display format (grid/list). 2. Describe where prices and titles are located (e.g., price below image). 3. List the first 5 items from the 'Browse Depop' section with their titles and prices. 4. Detail all available filter buttons and sorting options. 5. Note any visible popups or promotional banners (like 'Boosted Listings').
